title: AIREP profile: eu_ai_act_log v0.1
description: Maps an AIREP record onto EU AI Act record-keeping. INDICATIVE: the article references (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689) are a design aid and MUST be checked against the primary source before any compliance claim — AIREP produces evidence for these obligations, it does not by itself establish conformity. Carries the Article 12 automatic-logging fields, Article 19 log-retention, and Article 72/73 post-market-monitoring / serious-incident linkage. Attaches under profiles.eu_ai_act_log and never changes the core (the neutrality test). Carries NO raw personal data — natural persons are referenced by pseudonymous role only.

articles.description: The EU AI Act articles this record helps evidence (12 record-keeping, 14 human oversight, 19 automatically-generated logs, 72 post-market monitoring, 73 serious-incident reporting).

annex_iii_point.description: The Annex III high-risk use-case point if applicable (for example '1(a)' for remote biometric identification).

provider.description: The provider placing the system on the market.

use_period.description: Article 12(2)(a): the period of each use.

reference_database.description: Article 12(2)(b): the reference database against which input data was checked.

input_match.description: Article 12(2)(c): whether the input data search led to a match.

human_oversight.description: Article 14 / 12(2)(d): the natural person(s) verifying results, by pseudonymous role only — never raw identity.

verifier_role.description: Role or pseudonymous id of the verifying person (NOT a name or other personal data).

logging.description: Article 19: automatically generated logs and their retention.

retention_months.description: Article 19: kept at least 6 months unless other Union or national law applies.

post_market_monitoring.description: Article 72: data collected for the post-market monitoring system.

value.description: Carried as a string so two implementations agree on the bytes (SPEC §6).

reference.description: A pointer to the incident report filed with the authority.
